extension.description: Press the dot key to transform into anything.
config.title: Dot Anything
config.rules.description: Customize dot-anything rules, See [Rule Documentation](https://github.com/lqzhgood/vscode-ext-dot-anything) ⚠️ Setting this will override the default rules. See [Default Rules](https://github.com/lqzhgood/vscode-ext-dot-anything/blob/main/doc/rules/default.md) to copy them back.
config.rules.type.description: Rule type. text: replace with snippet template; function: execute snippet as a JavaScript function
config.rules.snippet.description: Snippet string (use #word# as placeholder) or function string
config.rules.replaceMode.description: Replacement scope: 'word' replaces only the matched text (default), 'line' replaces the entire line, 'file' replaces the entire file
config.rules.pattern.description: Regex to match text before cursor (trailing dot is stripped before matching). Default: (\S+)$
